metrics.metric: Worker count and phase count are user-configurable
metrics.target: config surface exists; defaults 4 workers / 3 phases

metrics.metric: Parallel workers in isolated git worktrees (acceptance run at defaults)
Pipeline phases per task (acceptance run at defaults)
Demo run: queued tasks reaching terminal state (done/failed-with-reason)

anti_goals.title: Never break execution momentum
anti_goals.metric: Workers killed mid-task by orchestrator without explicit cancel

anti_goals.title: Never lose worker state/progress/ownership
anti_goals.metric: Post-restart: in-flight runs failing to recover owner+progress+queue position (orphaned tasks)

anti_goals.title: No invisible execution
anti_goals.metric: State transitions without a persisted, UI-visible event

anti_goals.title: No regression to existing Kanna
anti_goals.metric: bun run lint + bun run test red on any commit; existing subagent/workflow/teams features broken

allowed: code changes in a dedicated git worktree branch, PR to cuongtranba/kanna main
c3 change-units for architecture doc updates
targeted tests/lint scoped to changed files (subagents); full suite only from orchestrator
forbidden: full project builds/test suites from parallel subagents
destructive git ops without human confirmation
